plastic.name: Plastic
plastic.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M12 22c5.523 0 10-4.477 10-10S17.523 2 12 2 2 6.477 2 12s4.477 10 10 10z' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.8' stroke-linecap='round' fill='none'/><path d='M16.24 7.76l-8.48 8.48' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.8' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M7.76 7.76l8.48 8.48' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.8' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

metal.name: Metal (Aluminum/Steel)
guidelines: Remove any plastic or paper labels
Aluminum and steel are highly recyclable
metal.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='8' stroke='var(--amber)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='2' fill='var(--amber)' opacity='0.6'/></svg>

glass.name: Glass
guidelines: Place in green glass recycling bin
Keep glass separate from other materials
glass.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='2' y='4' width='20' height='16' rx='3' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><path d='M2 12h20M2 8h20M2 16h20' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='0.8' opacity='0.3'/></svg>

paper.name: Paper/Cardboard
guidelines: Place in brown paper recycling bin
Avoid contamination with food or grease
paper.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='2' y='2' width='20' height='20' rx='2' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><line x1='5' y1='6' x2='19' y2='6' stroke='var(--muted)' stroke-width='0.8'/><line x1='5' y1='10' x2='17' y2='10' stroke='var(--muted)' stroke-width='0.8' opacity='0.6'/><line x1='5' y1='14' x2='19' y2='14' stroke='var(--muted)' stroke-width='0.8' opacity='0.4'/></svg>

organic.name: Organic/Food Waste
guidelines: Include food scraps, peels, and leftovers
Compost is converted to soil nutrients
organic.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M17 8C8 10 5.9 16.17 3.82 21.34l1.89.66.95-2.3c.48.17.98.3 1.34.3C19 20 22 3 22 3c-1 2-8 2.25-13 3.25S2 11.5 2 13.5a4 4 0 0 0 4 4c1.1 0 2.1-.45 2.83-1.17' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' fill='none'/></svg>

ewaste.name: E-Waste (Electronics)
guidelines: Do NOT place in regular bins
Take to designated e-waste collection center
Contains valuable metals and hazardous materials
Check campus IT department for drop-off locations
ewaste.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='6' y='3' width='12' height='18' rx='2' stroke='var(--leaf)' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none'/><line x1='10' y1='6' x2='14' y2='6' stroke='var(--muted)' stroke-width='1'/></svg>

hazardous.name: Hazardous Waste
guidelines: Do NOT place in regular bins
hazardous.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M10.29 3.86L1.82 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 0 0 1.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 0 0-3.42 0z' stroke='var(--red)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' fill='none'/><line x1='12' y1='9' x2='12' y2='13' stroke='var(--red)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='12' y1='17' x2='12.01' y2='17' stroke='var(--red)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

mixed.name: Mixed Waste
guidelines: Sort into plastic, metal, glass, paper, and organic
Place sorted items in appropriate bins
Reduce mixed waste by sorting at the source
Ask campus staff for sorting guidance
mixed.icon: <svg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><polyline points='3 6 5 6 21 6' stroke='var(--muted)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2' stroke='var(--muted)' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
